message:
perf(wasm): 7-phase rendering pipeline optimization

- Skip search index rebuild when query is empty (hot path)
- Fix RunnerCore take_outputs data loss: cache hash/stats/logs
- Row-scoped auto-link recomputation: O(cols×dirty_rows) vs O(cols×rows)
- DoubleBuffer swap in StepProgram: eliminate per-frame buffer clone
- Reusable flat patch buffers via prepare_flat_patches + flat_cells/flat_spans
- Lazy patch hash computation: skip FNV-1a when hash not read
- FNV hash batching: 16-byte cell batches reduce function call overhead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
